mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 0 AS menu_idx, -1 AS parent_menu_idx, '' AS menu_url, '최상위' AS menu_name, 0 AS print_seq, 'ROOT' AS menu_type, 1 AS load_on_demand FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT menu_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, print_seq, menu_type, CASE WHEN menu_type = 'FOLDER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS load_on_demand FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU ) CONNECT BY PRIOR menu_idx = parent_menu_idx START WITH parent_menu_idx = -1 ORDER SIBLINGS BY print_seq

SELECT menu_idx, group_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, menu_desc, menu_full_path_name, menu_type, print_seq, use_yn, view_yn, admin_access_yn, menu_auth, add_date, modify_date, css_type, module_idx FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU WHERE menu_idx = #{menu_idx}

SELECT menu_idx, group_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, menu_desc, menu_full_path_name, menu_type, print_seq, use_yn, view_yn, admin_access_yn, menu_auth, add_date, modify_date, css_type, module_idx FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU WHERE menu_url = #{menu_url}

SELECT menu_idx, group_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, menu_desc, menu_full_path_name, menu_type, print_seq, use_yn, view_yn, admin_access_yn, menu_auth, add_date, modify_date, css_type, module_idx FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU WHERE menu_idx = (SELECT parent_menu_idx FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU WHERE menu_idx = #{menu_idx})
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_ADMIN_MENU SET parent_menu_idx = #{move_target_menu_idx}, group_idx = NVL((SELECT group_idx FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU WHERE menu_idx = #{move_target_menu_idx}), 0), modify_date = SYSDATE WHERE menu_idx = #{menu_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT auth_id FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU_AUTH WHERE menu_idx = #{menu_idx}
SELECT auth_id FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU a, CMS_ADMIN_MENU_AUTH b WHERE a.menu_idx = b.menu_idx AND a.menu_url = #{menu_url}
SELECT NVL(max(print_seq),0)+10 FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU WHERE parent_menu_idx = #{menu_idx}

SELECT MENU_IDX, GROUP_IDX, PARENT_MENU_IDX, MENU_URL, MENU_NAME, MENU_DESC, MENU_FULL_PATH_NAME, MENU_TYPE, PRINT_SEQ, USE_YN, VIEW_YN, admin_access_yn, MENU_AUTH, ADD_DATE, MODIFY_DATE, CSS_TYPE, module_idx FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU WHERE TRIM(MENU_URL) IS NOT NULL

SELECT level AS menu_level, A.* FROM ( SELECT 0 AS menu_idx, -1 AS parent_menu_idx, '' AS menu_url, '최상위' AS menu_name, 0 AS print_seq, 'ROOT' AS menu_type, 0 as module_idx, 1 AS load_on_demand, '' AS moduleName, '' auth_group_id FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT menu_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, print_seq, menu_type, a.module_idx, CASE WHEN menu_type = 'FOLDER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS load_on_demand, module_name AS moduleName, auth_group_id FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU a, WB_MODULE_MNGT b WHERE view_yn = 'Y' AND use_yn = 'Y' AND admin_access_yn != 'Y' AND A.module_idx = b.module_idx(+) AND module_type(+) = 'CMS' ) A CONNECT BY PRIOR menu_idx = parent_menu_idx START WITH parent_menu_idx = -1 ORDER SIBLINGS BY print_seq

SELECT menu_idx, group_idx, parent_menu_idx, menu_url, menu_name, menu_desc, menu_full_path_name, menu_type, print_seq, use_yn, view_yn, admin_access_yn, menu_auth, add_date, modify_date, css_type, module_idx FROM CMS_ADMIN_MENU WHERE menu_type = 'module' AND module_idx = #{module_idx}
